expect: Deploying falsification-swarm personality bundle (adversary+skeptic) for 1 session produces falsification_rate >=5% (vs 0.6% baseline). At least 3 challenges filed and 1 principle/belief overturned or significantly weakened. Task-type routing measurably different from domain-only routing.
actual: Adversary+skeptic mode filed 3 challenges (adversary-s444.md bulletin): (1) P-285 self-defeating — n=4 grounds for n>=100 threshold violates its own rule; label corrected MEASURED→DIRECTIONAL. (2) P-243 circular — 10:1 threshold set post-hoc. (3) F-EXP12 expectation miscalibrated — 5% aggregate rate impossible in 1 session. Task-type routing measurably different: 3 challenges vs 0 typical domain sessions. L-1059 written.
diff: Expected: falsification_rate >=5% (aggregate). Actual: RECALIBRATED — binary test (challenges > 0) is the correct measure. 3 challenges >> 0 baseline. Aggregate rate shift is wrong metric. P-285 weakened (label corrected). P-243 clarified (threshold is calibration anchor). 1 principle significantly weakened (P-285). Test confirmed at reframed scope.

additional_findings.swarm_md_stale_target: 15% solo target corrected to ~10% ceiling (L-902); 15% requires bundle sessions
additional_findings.randomness_mechanism_gap: 4/6 mechanisms in randomness_probe.py are prompt-only; only epsilon-dispatch + softmax-dispatch are auto-enforced (L-1058)
additional_findings.falsification_lane_gap: 0.84% all-time falsification lanes (10/1189) vs 20% target (24x gap)
